prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: villain portrait. Story world: The Harvest Men. Premise: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight.. Setting: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds. Threat presence: The Reaper Steward. Recurring motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades. Design portrait of antagonist The Reaper Steward with archetype RIGHTEOUS_ZEALOT, speech style "Rural parable mixed with legal command.", and motifs corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades.. Subgenre: folk horror. Tone: SLOW_BURN. Immediate scene brief: The Harvest Men - Villain Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.
source_prompt: Story: The Harvest Men (the-harvest-men) | Hook: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight. | Subgenre: folk horror | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds | Villain: The Reaper Steward | Villain worldview: Communities survive only through chosen sacrifice. | Motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades.
